### What needs changes?

A clear description of what documentation is confusing, missing, or incorrect. Link to the relevant page if applicable.

### Suggested Changes

Write down your suggested wording or outline for the updated documentation.

### Affected Areas

Select all that apply:

- [ ] Frontend
- [ ] Backend
- [ ] Database
- [ ] AI
- [ ] Authentication
- [ ] PYQ Analysis
- [ ] Study Planner
- [ ] Dashboard
- [ ] UI/UX
